'''Skee''' was a portly [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who was a member of the [[Tetsu Clan]].

==Biography==
In [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], Skee and his family fled their native [[Rodia/Legends|world]] during the [[Rodian Clan Wars]] to start a new life for themselves on<ref name="Hunter's Fate" /> [[U-Tendik]].<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Skee discovered a predatory species of animal known as a [[Manka cat/Legends|Manka cat]] and became a prosperous Manka Cat hunter. He particularly enjoyed hunting them late in the year during mating season and would hang Manka pelts from the limbs of the [[Tendril tree]]s as a testament to his skill.<ref name="Hunter's Fate" />

In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], raiders from [[Navik/Legends|Navik]] the Red's [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza Clan]] found the Tetsus on the jungle planet and began slaughtering them. As they escaped Skee warned the others that everyone behind him was dead as the clan boarded their secret ships.<ref name="Hunter's Fate" />
